title: RegulatoryCompliance Input
description: Validated inputs for the regulatory-compliance skill execution

subject.description: The system, feature, DPA, or interface being assessed for compliance

jurisdictions.description: List of jurisdictions to assess compliance against

regulations.description: Specific regulations to check; if omitted all applicable regulations are assessed

dataCategories.description: Categories of personal data involved (e.g., name, email, IP address, behavioral data, biometrics)

dpaPath.description: File path to the DPA document to validate (required when assessmentScope includes DPA)

outputPath.description: Directory path to write the compliance report; defaults to .claude/context/reports/compliance/
